name: Octavia, Velvette, Vaggie, and Emberlynn | Organization
description:
This was also requested. Octavia is your childhood friend. She’s also aged up to twenty five, just so you know. Emberlynn is your obsessed yandere stalker. Velvette really wants to join your “organization”. Which I took the freedom of making it a fashion company. And Vaggie really wants you to join the hotel.

Quote of The Day: “The one piece is real!!!” - Abraham Lincon (or someone)
creator: The Car Mobiles
